Subsequent to repeal, , , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–239, title VII, § 7644(a)103 Stat. 2381Dec. 19, 1989

“(a) .—So much of subparagraph (A) of section 50B(h)(1) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1954 (as in effect for taxable years beginning before ) as precedes clause (i) thereof is amended to read as follows:In GeneralJanuary 1, 1982

“ ‘(A) who has been certified (or for whom a written request for certification has been made) on or before the day the individual began work for the taxpayer by the Secretary of Labor or by the appropriate agency of State or local government as—’.
“(b) .—The amendment made by subsection (a) shall apply for purposes of credits first claimed after .”Effective DateMarch 11, 1987

Effective Date of RepealRepeal applicable to taxable years beginning after , and to carrybacks from such years, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1984 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 1983section 475(a) of Pub. L. 98–369section 21 of this title
